sentences.english: Did the repair shop call you back about your laptop?
sentences.korean: 수리점에서 노트북 건으로 다시 전화 왔어?

sentences.english: Not yet. They said the replacement keyboard would arrive this afternoon.
sentences.korean: 아직이야. 교체 키보드가 오늘 오후에 도착할 거래.

sentences.english: How are you managing without a laptop?
The shop lent me one of theirs, so I can keep working. They'll text me when mine's ready.
sentences.korean: 수리점에서 하나 빌려줬어, 그래서 계속 일할 수 있어. 내 거 준비되면 문자 준대.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
